name: Publii
description: Desktop-based static site CMS for privacy-focused, SEO-optimized websites

description.value: Desktop-based static site CMS for privacy-focused, SEO-optimized websites

initial-release.comment: Initial alpha released December 2016; first beta in March 2017

cms-type.comment: Generates static HTML sites with built-in templating; not headless/API-first

deployment-model.comment: Desktop application that generates static files; supports deployment to GitHub Pages, Netlify, S3, SFTP, etc.

primary-language.comment: Built with Electron, Vue.js, and Handlebars templating

database-support.comment: No database required; stores content locally in flat files

api-type.comment: Generates static HTML; no API - content is baked into static files

multi-tenancy.comment: Can manage multiple sites from a single desktop installation

static-site-generation.comment: Core functionality - generates static HTML output

edge-deployment.comment: Static output can be deployed to CDN/edge platforms like Netlify, GitHub Pages, Cloudflare

content-types.comment: Only supports Posts and Pages; no custom content types. Feature has been requested.

custom-fields.comment: Basic custom fields via theme configuration (postConfig); limited compared to full CMS solutions

field-types.comment: Theme Settings API includes text, textarea, WYSIWYG, dropdowns, color pickers, image uploads, repeaters

content-relationships.comment: Tags for organization but no true content relationships between entries

localization.comment: Multi-language websites not natively supported; on the roadmap. Theme and UI translations available.

embedded-interactives.comment: Can embed HTML, iframes, code snippets via WYSIWYG and Block editors

content-versioning.comment: No built-in version history; relies on local file backups or git

draft-publish.comment: Supports saving posts as drafts before publishing

scheduled-publishing.comment: Can set future dates but does not auto-publish; requires manual sync

approval-workflows.comment: Single-user desktop application; no multi-step approval workflows

content-locking.comment: Desktop app - no concurrent editing scenarios

audit-logging.comment: No audit trail; desktop application with local storage

media-library.comment: Built-in media management for images and files

image-transformations.comment: Automatic responsive images, resizing, and WebP conversion during build

external-media-storage.comment: Media stored locally; final static site can be deployed anywhere but no S3/Cloudinary integration for source

video-support.comment: Video embedding supported; includes consent management for embedded videos

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded and used in content

folder-organization.comment: Flat media library without folder structure

role-based-access.comment: Single-user desktop application; no role system

team-collaboration.comment: Single-user desktop application; no collaboration features

audience-restrictions.comment: Generates static public sites; no access control for content

typescript-sdk.comment: No SDK - generates static sites, not consumed via API

local-development.comment: Entirely local - runs offline on desktop with built-in preview

webhooks.comment: No webhook system; static site generator with manual sync

plugin-system.comment: Plugin system since v0.39; 30+ plugins for analytics, comments, search, etc.

admin-ui-customization.comment: Theme-based customization; Theme Settings API for custom options

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with user guides and developer docs; comprehensive theme development resources

frontend-frameworks.comment: Not headless; uses Handlebars templating with included themes. No framework integrations.

search-integration.comment: Static Search, Google Custom Search, and DocSearch plugins available

analytics-integration.comment: Plugins for Google Analytics, Matomo, Plausible, and Umami

cdn-included.comment: Desktop app; CDN depends on where you deploy static files

response-caching.comment: Static files - caching handled by hosting provider

rate-limits.comment: Desktop app generating static files; no API rate limits

global-regions.comment: Desktop app; multi-region depends on static hosting choice

open-source.comment: GPL-3.0 licensed; source code on GitHub

pricing-model.comment: Free core product; optional paid themes and plugins in marketplace

commercial-support.comment: Community support via forum; no commercial support offering

enterprise-features.comment: No enterprise tier; designed for individual users and small teams
